resources.string: Sound settings, Pulse and other volume customization
Customize lockscreen clock and many more...
We love open source, check us out
We are on telegram. Join us!
Press on color below to apply
Restart SystemUI for change to take effect!
For changes to take effect, a SystemUI restart is required. Restart SystemUI now?
Load a custom keybox XML to override device key attestation
Custom keybox XML loaded. Delete to clear.
Not an XML file. Choose a valid keybox XML.
Invalid keybox XML: required fields missing
Bypass app restrictions by spoofing components
Spoof a select group of Google apps to the latest Pixel device
Spoof your device to pass Google Play Attestation
Apply device spoofing to Google Play Store
Spoof the Google Photos app as a Pixel XL
Spoof Snapchat as a Pixel XL to fix possible chat issues
Successfully downloaded pif.json. Spoofing as %1$s for Play Integrity.
Update PIF spoofing device (Requires internet connection.)
Get random spoofing device from Google list. (Requires internet connection.)
Show all currently set PIF properties
Choose the PIF JSON file to be used to spoof Play Integrity
Choose which apps to spoof device properties for
This will remove all configured app spoofing entries.
Long press to quickly reassign profile
Choose which system icons can be shown
Display battery status for the connected Bluetooth device, if available
Display the number of unread notifications on each app icon
Use launcher icons for app notifications
Display an indicator when an app accesses the microphone or camera
Display an indicator when an app accesses your location
Display an indicator when the screen is being projected
Display seconds next to clock in status bar
Hide clock at specific time based intervals
Number of seconds to hide clock
Number of seconds to wait before hiding clock
Hide clock if launcher is visible
Select custom background chip behind clock
Must be in DateFormat eg. MM/dd/yy
Display and customize battery bar above status bar
Blend full/empty colors corresponding to battery percentage
Full → empty: red ← green ← blue ← red
Full → empty: red → green → blue → red
Use gradient color as a scale for the battery level
Display a custom logo on the status bar
Display Wi-Fi standard next the Wi-Fi icon
For better visibility on bright images
Select an image to use for static mode
You must install a gallery app!
Show user switcher when showing pin/password prompt
Enabling this will disable hardware keys for navigation
Display current, voltage, wattage, and temperature stats while charging
Show ripple animation when unlocked with fingerprint
Allow accessing power menu on secure lockscreen
Set any custom icon in prebuilt icon before switching or applying custom icon\'s After restart device restart systemui once it will fix invisible/blank custom icon issue
Adjust the vertical position of fingerprint animation
Adjust the size of fingerprint animation
Vibrate when fingerprint authentication is successful
Swap the order of recents and back buttons
Prevent interaction with navigation buttons while the screen is being touched
Configure led color based on battery level and status
Lights in Do Not Disturb mode
To add per app control, activate \'%1$s\' and press \'Add\'
Display data usage summary in quick settings footer
Provide haptic feedback on changing brightness using slider
Provide haptic feedback on tapping QS tiles
QS rows should be equal or greater than QQS rows. Use higher number of columns for circle / square (A11) QS tile style.
Swipe down on Lock screen to view Quick Settings
Display media cover art when available
Display media cover art when available
Set media cover art fade level
Display media artwork on Always-On Display
Choose visual filter for media art
Adjust the pixel size for media artwork displayed on the lock screen
Darkness overlay for better text readability
Blur intensity when blur filter is applied
Answer incoming calls by pressing the home button
A half press will keep the screen on only while the button is held down
A longpress and release will launch camera
Activate the torch by long pressing the power button while the display is off
Seek music tracks by long-pressing the volume keys while the display is off
End the current call by pressing the power button
Swap volume buttons when the screen is rotated
Wake device by pressing the button
Answer incoming calls by pressing the volume buttons
Short click Volume Down and Power to take partial screenshot

Power off verification protects your device by preventing others from turning it off immediately after it\'s lost, increasing the chances of recovery. You only need to enter your lock screen password when powering off or restarting the phone from the lock screen.
When your device is locked, you\'ll need to use your password to power off or restart.
Lockdown is disabled as keyguard isn\'t secure
When unlocked, include options in the power menu for restarting into recovery or bootloader
Display advanced restart options on secured lockscreen
Display visualizer on always-on display and ambient mode. Disable to show only on lockscreen.
Show a bar visualizer on the lock screen while music is playing
Display visualizer bars with rounded corners
Set how many bars are shown in the visualizer
Light up the side edges of the screen on notification pulse
Number of pulses for edge light
Set thickness for edge light bars
Display popup notifications only for alarm, dialer and messaging app
Play sound and vibration for notifications when screen is on
Time to display heads up notifications
Show force stop button in the notification\'s longpress menu
Show an overlay in the left bottom corner of the screen when something is copied to the clipboard
Display an animation when the device is plugged in
Customize device specific ambient display settings
Wake up the device instead of pulsing notifications
Pulse notifications on removal from pocket
Duration to vibrate when pulsing notifications
Settings based on sensors are subject to hardware compatibility. Enabling sensors for ambient display may increase power drain.
Display icons along with level & temperature
Display info when device is charging
Show music ticker on Ambient Display during track change
Set schedule for always on display
Turns on from sunset till a time
Turns on from a time till sunrise
Force apps to ignore notch space

Smart pixels is a power saving feature. Depending on how many pixels you decide to turn off, you could see improvement in battery life. Note that in some cases it can result in unresponsive areas on touch screen
Save battery by shutting off extra pixels
Shut off pixels to reduce power consumption
Enable Smart Pixels when battery saver is enabled
Prevents burn-in on OLED devices by shifting pixels every so often
Show a floating rotate button when device is rotated
Play sound when screenshot is taken
Setup icon pack and weather service
Requires custom weather service configured and smartspace disabled
Display current wind speed and direction
Display carrier name in the status bar
This allows you to downgrade applications. Note that this may lead to crashes and data corruption.
Show seekbar squiggle animation in media panel when playing media
Enable animated waveform effect for media playback progress
